title: Vanilla 3D Plant Pack
description: Adds 3D models to plants while keeping vanilla textures.
body:
# Vanilla 3D Plant Pack
Adds 3D models to some plants while keeping the vanilla textures. 

This is an add-on to [Vanilla 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla_3d) (but separate due to lag).

WARNING: These models cause lag on lower performance PCs and high render distances.

![3D models of grass, bamboo, and vines.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8911477b99b6b6689ed13f6b2679a5348271567a.png)

![3D models of seagrass and kelp.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/481baeeb956c47cd48c8f254298989b254f491f2.png)

New Models:
- Bamboo
- Kelp
- Seagrass
- Short Grass
- Tall Grass
- Vine

Adds variations of Short Grass
